title: Why do Americans drink defaf Coffee   Request

enrichment.summary: Kyle responds to a viewer request asking why Americans drink so much decaf coffee. He defends Americans as the world's biggest and most varied coffee drinkers, arguing decaf reflects how much Americans love coffee's taste beyond just the caffeine hit.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Americans are the biggest, most diverse coffee drinkers in the world
Decaf shows Americans love coffee for the taste, not just the caffeine
Other countries only drink it black with no sugar, which is boring compared to American variety
